description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metallic head and a wooden handle with a natural grain pattern. The axe head is thick and rectangular with a single sharp cutting edge and a flat poll, suitable for both chopping and splitting tasks. The handle is slightly curved for ergonomic grip and control, tapering towards the end for secure handling. The wood appears untreated or lightly finished, showing visible texture and grain, while the metal head has a matte, slightly worn finish. The mounting of the head to the handle is traditional, with the handle passing through the eye of the axe head. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a dark metal head and a curved wooden handle, designed for chopping and splitting. The blade is thick and rectangular, and the handle shows natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the thick, rectangular metal head with a sharp edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle, emphasizing the thickness of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the axe and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the flat poll of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle, with the wood grain visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, oval cross-section, ergonomic taper, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Thick, rectangular steel blade with a single sharp edge and a flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the blade.
